channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Argentina's Dramatic Comeback Against England Secures World Cup Final Spot
item.description: In a thrilling semi-final clash at the Atlanta Stadium, Argentina staged a remarkable 2-1 comeback against England to secure their place in the 2026 FIFA World Cup final. The match, which drew a crowd...

item.title: Tom Cruise to Appear in FIFA World Cup 2026 Closing Ceremony
item.description: The FIFA World Cup 2026 has confirmed that actor Tom Cruise will participate in the star-studded closing ceremony of the tournament, which will take place on July 19 at the New York New Jersey Stadium...

item.title: England and Argentina Draw 0-0 in High-Octane World Cup Semifinal
item.description: In a fiercely contested World Cup semifinal, England and Argentina played out a 0-0 draw after 90 minutes of intense, physical football. The match, held in 2026, showcased a blend of tactical battles ...

item.title: DepEd's Active Shooter Drills: Guidelines for Students and Staff

item.title: Messi leads Argentina's thrilling comeback victory over England in World Cup semi-final
item.description: Lionel Messi delivered a masterclass performance, providing two assists to help Argentina stage a remarkable comeback against England in their 2026 FIFA World Cup semi-final. The match, held at Atlant...

item.title: Italian airline Neos starts direct flights to Tanzania, boosting tourism
item.description: Italian airline Neos has launched direct flights to Tanzania, marking a significant boost for the tourism sector. The maiden flight landed at Kilimanjaro International Airport (KIA) on July 15, 2026, ...

item.title: Keir Starmer's Final PMQs: A Heartfelt Farewell Amidst Political Camaraderie
item.description: Keir Starmer's final Prime Minister's Questions (PMQs) marked a poignant farewell as colleagues extended warm tributes, with Kemi Badenoch delivering a notably supportive performance. The session, des...

item.title: Trump Administration's Crackdown on Dissent Mirrors Bush-Era 'Imaginary' Fiasco

item.title: Supreme Court Directs Uttarakhand Govt to Transfer Land for New High Court Building Within Six Weeks
item.description: The Supreme Court has expedited the relocation of the Uttarakhand High Court to Nainital, directing the state government to transfer land for the new building within six weeks. This decision overturne...

item.title: Trump Nominees Face Bipartisan Scrutiny Over Vaccine Stances
item.description: The article discusses the growing bipartisan scrutiny facing Trump administration health nominees regarding their positions on vaccines. It highlights how congressional investigations are examining wh...

item.title: Canadian dollar rises on BoC guidance, but speculative bearish bets reach 18-month peak
item.description: The Canadian dollar strengthened to a four-week high against the U.S. dollar following the Bank of Canada's (BoC) policy decision, though its gains were limited as the central bank omitted hawkish lan...

item.title: US Defence Secretary Launches Testosterone Screening Program for Military Personnel
item.description: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth has announced a new screening program aimed at identifying testosterone deficiency among military personnel. The initiative, part of broader efforts to enhance troop ...

item.title: Argentina overcome England's lead to advance to World Cup final
item.description: In a dramatic FIFA World Cup 2026 semifinal clash, Argentina staged a remarkable second-half comeback against England to secure their place in the final. Substitute Lautaro Martinez scored the decisiv...

item.title: VP Sara Duterte's Legal Team Asserts Commitment to Legal Standards in Bank and Tax Record Dispute
item.description: The defense team of Vice President Sara Duterte has denied attempts to block the release of her bank and tax records, emphasizing adherence to legal procedures. Lawyer Michael Poa stated that the team...

item.title: Maine as a premier travel destination for nature lovers and seafood enthusiasts
item.description: The article highlights Maine as an ideal summer escape in the United States, emphasizing its natural beauty, scenic road trips, and world-renowned lobster cuisine. It positions the state as a must-vis...

item.description: President Bola Tinubu will be seated very close to US President Donald Trump during the 81st United Nations General Assembly (UNGA) in September, according to Nigeria’s Permanent Representative to the...

item.title: Fire Destroys Multiple Businesses in Lang'ata, Nairobi; Emergency Response Underway
item.description: A severe fire erupted in the Southlands area of Lang'ata, Nairobi County, on Wednesday, July 15, 2026, devastating several businesses and prompting an urgent response from emergency services. The blaz...

item.title: A Minimalist Masterpiece: The Ribbon Chapel in Hiroshima's Scenic Landscape
item.description: The Ribbon Chapel, designed by Hiroshi Nakamura & NAP, is a remarkable architectural achievement located on a hill in Hiroshima, offering breathtaking views of the inland Sea of Japan. Its design is c...

item.title: Scientists Discover Brain Cell Structure That May Help Combat Alzheimer's
item.description: Researchers have identified a previously unknown structure within brain cells, dubbed the 'hidden skeleton gatekeeper,' which plays a critical role in regulating cellular processes linked to Alzheimer...

item.title: Authorities prepare water conservation strategies as Angat Dam levels remain below critical threshold
item.description: The Philippine Star reports that the water level in Angat Dam, located in Bulacan, has dropped to 155.91 meters, which is 4.09 meters below the critical level. Authorities have cited recent rains and ...
